headline: Evaluating DaVita (DVA) After A Strong Share Price Rally And Mixed Valuation Signals
summary: DaVita (DVA) has drawn attention after a strong stock move over the past week, month, and past 3 months. This has prompted investors to reassess how its dialysis focused business and current valuation line up. See our latest analysis for DaVita. The recent surge has pushed DaVita’s share price to $196.26, with strong short term momentum and multi year total shareholder returns above 100% suggesting that sentiment and risk perceptions have shifted meaningfully. If this move has you looking...
